rationale: All AC items implemented in commit 29df1393: verbatim preamble replaces Core Thesis, 6 principles in 3 groups, operating-principles preamble, Principle #1 updated, mission/library copy broadened, 4-way producer/consumer sentence, new Three-Layer Run Architecture subsection, KVP additions. HELIX principles.md untouched.

findings.summary: Review diff shown only contains execution evidence (manifest.json/result.json); actual vision changes live in result_rev 29df1393 and were verified separately.
'KVP table' additions are realized as bullets in 'What DDx Provides' (existing structure is a bullet list, not a table) plus a real table in the new Three-Layer subsection. Matches intent.
